sourceTitle: Guidelines for Using ChatGPT and other Generative AI tools at Harvard
verificationNotes: Official letter from Provost Alan Garber, EVP Meredith Weenick, and VP/CIO Klara Jelinkova. Initial university-wide guidelines on generative AI use and procurement. Covers information security, data privacy, compliance, copyright, and academic integrity. Explicitly notes these are not new policy but leverage existing policies.
